metadata.title:
BARRIERS AND


ENGINEERS QUIT


LABOR ASSEMBLY

pages.raw_text:
The BARRIERS and steam engineers
unions withdrew from the trades as
sembly last night Heretofore both
unions have maintained delegates in
both central bodies. The secretary
of the trades assembly was instruct
ed to notify the international officers
Of both unions of the action taken
by their bodies.


c. y. Young, organizer for Wash
ington for the American Federation
of Labor, was present at last nights
meeting of the assembly and talked
on the local situation. Mr. Young
organized the assembly over a year
ago. He made an interesting talk
on the work of the American FEEDER
alton and the good it has accom-
plished.


President Joyce reported to the as
sembly that the delegates to the
American Federation of Labor from
the hotel and restaurant employees
unions had been instructed to present
